reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 무색소, 무첨가 좋은제품같아서 처음 구매해봤는데 우리집 귀염둥이가 넘 좋아합니다~~ 평소에 입으로 씹는걸 좋아해서 개껌을 항상 준비해두는데, 이 제품은 오래오래 씹고있어서 좋아요^^
reviews.content_en: It seemed like a good product with no artificial colors or additives, so I tried it for the first time and my sweet pup absolutely loves it~~ She usually likes to chew, so I always have dog chews ready, but this product keeps her chewing for such a long time, which is great^^

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
애동카나 식당 데려가서 이거 하나면
댕육아가 편해집니다🥰
reviews.content_en: Whether I'm at a pet café or taking my dog to a restaurant, this one product makes dog parenting so much easier 🥰

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
지속적으로 먹이고 있어요~~
아침 출근시에 주는데 아이들이 먹을 시간만 되면 
알아서 기다려 자세가 되요 ~ㅎㅎ
아직 어려서 1/4만 주고 있는데 그전엔 변이 좋았는데 요즘 물을 잘 안마셔서 변이 조금 그래서 급여량을 좀더 늘려야 겠어요 ~~
끊을수 없는 간식 ㅎㅎㅎ
잘먹이고 다시 주문하러 올께요~~~
reviews.content_en: I've been feeding this consistently~~ I give it in the morning before heading to work, and my pups automatically get into position and wait when it's time to eat ㅎㅎ Since they're still young, I'm only giving 1/4 portions. Before this their poop was fine, but lately they haven't been drinking much water so the poop isn't great, so I think I need to increase the portion a bit~~ A snack we can't live without ㅎㅎㅎ I'll keep feeding it and come back to order again~~~

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content: 저희 강쥐가 간식을 주면 금방 다 먹어버려서 좀 오래먹을 수 있는 개껌을 찾다가 구매했는데요,,,진짜,,,하루종일 물고 다녀요,,,,완전 질긴 롬이구만유,,,저희 강쥐 입에 들어가면 3초만에 순삭인디,,,햅격입니다!
reviews.content_en: My pup devours treats so quickly, so I was looking for a dog chew she could eat for longer, and I got this...but seriously...she carries it around all day...it's crazy chewy though,,,my pup demolishes it in 3 seconds once it's in her mouth,,,not what I expected!

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content:
소화기가 약한 아이인데
하루 한개씩 급여해도 탈 안나고 변 상태도 괜찮아서
믿고 재주문 합니다~
한 봉지 다 먹었네요
밥 먹을 동안 아주 얌전히 오래 먹어서 좋아요 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: My pup has a sensitive digestive system, but even giving one a day doesn't cause any issues and her poop looks great, so I trust it and reorder~~ She finished the whole bag, and it's so nice that she chews it slowly and carefully for a long time while we eat dinner ㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 구****
reviews.content: 강아지가 너무 좋아해서 다 떨어질 때마다 사는 간식이에요
reviews.content_en: My dog loves it so much that I buy it every time we run out

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
처음로 우리 아로한테 개시한 롤리츄~~!!
아직 3개월꽉채우려면 일주일정도 남았지만 
이갈이시기라 장난감으로는 해소가 안돼는거같아서
구매했어요~~ㅎ
처음보는 장난감이라 생각해서 그런지 어색해 하더니
금방 물고뜯고 사료도 조심스럽게 먹는 편이라 잘먹으려나
걱정했는데 아주 잘근잘근 잘 씹어먹어요
다른 우유껌처럼 딱딱하기만하고 인위적인 향이 나지도 않고
마음에 쏙 들었어요 아로가 다른 강쥐들에 비해 작은편이라
두고두고 잘 먹을거같아요 ~~!
다 떨어지면 또 사주려구요 매우 만족합니다^^
reviews.content_en: Introducing our Aro to a chew roll for the first time~~!! We still have about a week left until she's 3 months old, but she's in her teething phase and toys alone don't seem to help, so I bought this~~ Since it was a new toy she'd never seen before, she seemed unsure at first, but she quickly started chewing on it. She eats her kibble carefully too, so I was worried if she'd eat it well, but she chews on it really well and thoroughly. Unlike other milk chews, it's not hard and doesn't have an artificial smell, so I'm really impressed! Since Aro is on the smaller side compared to other dogs, I think she'll enjoy it for a long time~~ I'll definitely buy it again when it runs out. Very satisfied^^

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 마누카꿀 이즈 뭔들~ 입맛 까다로운 우리 첫째도 입맛 홀리는 맛인가봐요!😆 얘가 성격이랑 입맛이 진짜 까탈스러워서 간식도 주문해놓고 실패한 게 한두가지가 아닌데 정말 잘 먹어요!☺️ 비싸게 주고 샀는데 안 먹을 땐 너무 속상하고 뜯어서 반품도 못해서 당근해서 나눔한 적도 한 두번이 아니거든요…🥲 근데 이렇게 잘 먹어주는 간식 찾으면 정착할 수 밖에 없어요~🥰 마누카꿀 롤리츄 오래오래 팔아주세요~🫶🏻
reviews.content_en: What's the deal with Manuka honey~ Even our picky first pup seems to love the taste! 😆 Since she has a really fussy personality and palate, I've failed with more than one or two treats I've ordered, but she eats this really well! ☺️ It's expensive, and when she doesn't eat something, I feel so disappointed and can't even return it since it's opened, so I've had to give it away more than once...🥲 But when you find a treat she eats this well, you just have to stick with it~🥰 Please keep selling Manuka honey chew rolls for a long time~🫶🏻

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
까탈쟁이 우리 강아지님께서는 덴탈껌 종류는 안드십니다ㅠ
사정사정하면 먹기는 하는데 간식을.. 굳이.. 사정해서 먹이고 싶지는 않고 주면 환장해야 그게 간식이자나요!? ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 근데 우피껌은 엄청 좋아해요 (그는 고기파!)
고기 붙어있는 중국산 우유껌도 잘먹는데 매일 먹이다 보니 몸에 좋지 않을 것 같아서 바잇미 우피껌으로 정착했습니다!
벌써 세번째 구매에요 ㅎㅎ
매일 먹여도 되나 싶긴한데 사료를 잘안먹어서 저녁 먹으면 보상처럼 줬었는데 이제 습관이 되어서 밥먹고 나서 안주면 아주 온 집안을 샅샅히 뒤지면서 다 어지럽혀놔요 ㅋㅋㅋ
어디 하나 숨겨놓은거 없나 찾나보더라구요 
잘먹어줘서 기특! 가격도 좋아서 너무 만족하는 롤리츄에용❤️
reviews.content_en: My picky pup won't eat dental chews ㅠ If I keep asking, she'll eat them, but I don't really want to beg her to eat a treat... if she's going to eat it, she should go crazy for it, right?! ㅋㅋㅋㅋ But she absolutely loves beef chews (she's a meat lover!) She eats the Chinese milk chews with meat on them fine too, but since I was feeding them daily, it seemed like it wouldn't be good for her health, so I settled on BITE ME beef chews! This is already my third purchase ㅎㅎ I wonder if it's okay to give every day, but since she doesn't eat her kibble well, I used to give it as a reward after dinner, and now it's become a habit—if I don't give it after she eats, she tears the whole house apart searching for it ㅋㅋㅋ Looking everywhere like she might have hidden something somewhere. I'm so proud she eats it well! The price is great too, so I'm really satisfied with this chew roll ❤️

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
포장지도 깔끔하고 지퍼팩 형식이라서 보관도 용이하고 너무 좋아요!! 냄새도 잘 안 나서 집안에서 먹여도 냄새에 예민하신 분들도 편안해하실거 같습니다. 그리고 간식 부스러기 아예 없습니다!! 
무엇보다 아이가 너무 좋아해요ㅎㅎ이갈이 중이라서 더 잘 씹어서 먹습니다!ㅎㅎ기호성이 좋네요~ 오래먹을 수 있는 간식이라서 더 좋습니다! 
간식표지에 하루권장량은 크게 적어두고 먹이고 있습니다ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The packaging is clean and it's in a zipper bag format so it's really easy to store and I love it!! The smell isn't strong either, so even people sensitive to smells would feel comfortable giving it indoors. And there are zero treat crumbs!! Most importantly, my pup loves it so much ㅎㅎ Since she's teething, she chews it even better ㅎㅎ Great palatability~ It's even better because it's a treat she can enjoy for a long time! I'm feeding it according to the daily recommended amount written clearly on the treat label ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
저희 6개월 미니비숑 강아지는 2.5키로에요  하나줘놓으니 다먹을때까지계속 물고있네요ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
물고 있는 모습이 어찌나 귀여운지
형아가 하교해서 집애 들어올때도 이 껌만은 물고 놓지를 않아요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
저희 아이는 다먹는데 한시간쯤 걸린거같아요
덩어리 삼킬까봐 관심돌리려고 일어나서 다른 간식 가지러간 순간 꿀떡 삼키더라구요  아직 강아지라 식탐이 강해서 이점은 유의해야 할거같아요^^
여튼 잘 먹고 오래 먹어요 좋네요
아침에 나가기전에 하나씩 주고 가면 좋을거같아요^^
reviews.content_en: Our 6-month-old mini Bichon puppy weighs 2.5kg, and once I give him one, he just keeps chewing on it until it's all gone ㅋㅋㅋㅋ He's so adorable when he's chewing on it. Even when his older brother comes home from school, he won't let go of this chew ㅋㅋㅋㅋ It took about an hour for our pup to finish one. I was worried he'd swallow it in chunks, so I got up to distract him with another treat, but he swallowed it right away ㅋㅋㅋ Since he's still a puppy with a big appetite, I need to keep an eye on that ^^ Anyway, he eats it well and it lasts a long time, which is great. I think it would be good to give him one before heading out in the morning ^^

reviews.name: 경****
reviews.content:
최근 발바닥 사탕질을 해대는 울구름이 위해서 구매했어요~
다이어트 중이라 탄수화물은 안되서
100% 단백질이라서 구매 했어요!

바잇미! 추천!
후기 믿고 구매 했어요!!

꺼내자 마자 자기꺼라는걸 아는 구름이 인증샷~♡


착한가격!!!!! 무조건 쟁이세요!!!!!!!
reviews.content_en: I recently bought this for my Guleum who's been licking his paws a lot~ Since he's on a diet and can't have carbs, I got it because it's 100% protein! BITE ME! Highly recommend! I bought it based on the reviews!! As soon as I took it out, Guleum knew it was his - here's the proof shot ♡ Great price!!!!! Definitely get it!!!!!!!!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
츄* 이라는 우피껌 먹이다가 첨사봤어요
색깔이며 성분이 비슷하네요.
거기는 직사각형으로 납작한 모양인데 이건 둥글고 앏게 되있네요.
소형견이라 먹기엔 크지않고 이게더 나은것 같아요~ 
한개주면 하루종일 생각날때마다 물고뜯고 스트레스 푸는것같아서 요런종류껌 안떨어뜨리는 편인데
저렴이들 잘못사면 표백제나 안전성이 염려되서 신중하게 구매하는데 바잇미 롤리츄는 안심할수 있네요
한팩에 5천원미만이니 가격도 나쁘지 않고
또 이용하겠습니다~^^
reviews.content_en: I used to feed a woofie chew called Chu*, and I tried this for the first time. The color and ingredients are similar. That one is flat and rectangular, but this one is round and thin. Since my pup is small, it's not too big for him, and this seems better~ When I give him one, he chews and tears at it all day whenever he thinks of it - it's like stress relief. I don't usually run out of this type of chew, but I'm always careful when buying because cheap ones raise concerns about bleach and safety. BITE ME Lolly Chew puts my mind at ease. At less than 5,000 won per pack, the price is good too. I'll definitely use it again~ ^^

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 냄새 맡자마자 덥썩 물더니 최애 자리 (아빠 이불 위)로 가네요 ㅎㅎ 잘 먹고 좋아합니다~ 유통기한도 내년 11월이라 넉넉해요!^^ 지금 이불 위에서 신나신나 댄스 중입니다~*
reviews.content_en: As soon as he smelled it, he grabbed it and took it to his favorite spot (on dad's blanket) ㅎㅎ He eats it well and loves it~ The expiration date is also November of next year, so there's plenty of time!! Right now he's dancing excitedly on the blanket~ *

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
저희집 두마리 강아지가 너무 너무 좋아하네요
너무 얇지도 두껍지도 않아서 소형견에게 딱 맞는 사이즈입니다. 오래 씹어서 좋아요 재구매 의사 있습니다^^
reviews.content_en: Both of my dogs love this so much. It's not too thin and not too thick - the perfect size for small dogs. I like that it lasts a long time when they chew on it. I'd definitely repurchase ^^

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 그동안 정말 우피인지 찜찜해서 사본적이 없다가 이걸 사보니 일단 냄새가 사골냄새가 구수하게 났고 우피 그대로의 색인듯하여 맘에 들었어요. 일단 한개만 주문하려는데 3종이 있길래 받자마자 일단 줘보니 천천히 시간들여 어찌나 잘먹는지 정말 뿌듯했어요. 그동안의 일반 개껌은 금방 없어져서 아쉬웠는데 말이죠. 이젠 개껌이나 우피는 여기에서 계속 주문해야되겠어요~~
reviews.content_en: I've been hesitant about whether it's real yak chew, so I never bought it before. But when I tried this, the smell was a rich bone broth aroma and the color looked like real yak chew, so I loved it. I was only going to order one, but there were 3 types, so I gave them to him right away and he ate so slowly and carefully - it was truly rewarding. Regular dog chews disappear so quickly, which was disappointing. From now on, I'll keep ordering dog chews and yak chews from here~~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
산양유껌은 처음 구매하는데 처음에 낯설어하더니만
자기집에 물고가서 열심히 뜯고있네요
유통기간도 넉넉하고 제조국도 수입아닌 울나라꺼라 더 좋아요
reviews.content_en: This is my first time buying goat milk chew. At first, he seemed unfamiliar with it, but now he takes it to his spot and chews on it eagerly. The expiration date is generous too, and I like it even more because it's made in Korea, not imported.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
배송받자마자 자기껀줄 어떻게 알고 빨리달라고 하더라구요 
입맛 까다로운 저희집 레오 야무지게 꼭 잡고 엄청 오래먹엇어요! 밥먹는동안 한개 줫는데 너무 귀엽게 꼭꼭 씹어 먹었답니다
reviews.content_en: As soon as we got the delivery, he somehow knew which one was his and asked for it right away ㅋㅋ My picky eater Leo held it firmly and chewed on it for such a long time! I gave him one while we were eating, and he chewed on it so cutely ^^

reviews.name: 심****
reviews.content:
밖에 같이 데리고 나갈 일이 많아서 댕댕이도 가방안에서 오래 먹을 간식이 필요했는데 딱이에요 크기도 적당하고 (초소형견이라 항상 덴탈껌제외하고는 급여하기엔 크기가 애매한 것들이 많았음 ㅠ)
강력해요 기호성도 좋아요!!
reviews.content_en: I often take my pup out and about, so I needed a treat he could chew on for a long time while in my bag - this is perfect! The size is just right (I have a toy breed, so most treats besides dental chews are awkwardly sized ㅠ) It's durable, and he really likes it!! Great for when we're out!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 처음 줬을땐 잘먹었는데 그다음부턴 안먹고 지키면서 으르렁거리기만 해요; 근데 목욕시키고 드라이할땐 또 잘먹고 아주 유용함 뜯는데 오래걸리고 여기에 집중하느라 빗질할때 훨씬 수월해요 원플원 행사 감사합니다
reviews.content_en: He ate it well the first time, but after that he just guards it and growls ;; But when I bathe him and dry him, he eats it well again - super useful. It takes a long time to tear through, and since he's focused on it, it's much easier to brush him. Thank you for the one-plus-one event!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
울애기 넘 잘먹어요
물고빨다 하얗게 된부분은 가위로 쓱 잘라주면 맛나게 냠냠
야무지게 뜯네요
첨가물이없어 좋아요 재구매 의사 1000프로있습니당
reviews.content_en: My baby loves it so much! 😊 The white parts from chewing can be trimmed with scissors and she munches on it happily. She tears into it so eagerly. I love that there are no additives. 100% will repurchase!

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content:
국내산 재료라서 처음 구매해 봤어요 
지퍼백이라서 보관하기 좋아요 
냄새는 살짝 고소하네요 
혹시 딱딱하거나 너무 질기려나 싶었는데 
아주 두 손 꼭 잡고 야무지게 먹네요 
맛있는지 처음 먹는데 거부감 없이 십분컷 하네요 ㅋㅋ 
잘 먹는걸 보니 할인 할때 더 사놔야겠어요
reviews.content_en: I bought it for the first time because it's made with domestic ingredients. The ziplock bag is great for storage. It has a slightly nutty smell. I was worried it might be too hard or tough, but he chews it really well with both paws! He ate the whole thing on first try without any hesitation ㅋㅋ Seeing how well he eats it, I should definitely stock up when it's on sale!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
받자마자 냄새 맡고 달려와서 주니까 잘먹네요!^^ 
다 먹으면 또 주문하려구요~ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: As soon as he got it, he smelled it and came running, so he's eating it well! ^^ Once he finishes, I'm ordering again~ ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
식탐 많은 강아지라 아주 잘먹어요 ㅋㅋ
이중포장이라 더 안전하네요~~
reviews.content_en: My pup has a big appetite and eats it really well ㅋㅋ The double packaging makes it even safer~~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
원래 우피껌 잘 먹는 아이라 좀 두꺼운 다른 브랜드꺼 자주 샀는데 세일하길래 사봤는데 역시나 잘 먹어요..
금방 호로록 씹어 먹긴하지만 그래도 국내산이라 맘에 듭니다.
reviews.content_en: My dog usually eats rawhide chews well, and I used to buy thicker ones from other brands often, but I gave this a try since it was on sale and he loves it as expected.. He does chew through it pretty quickly, but I'm still happy because it's domestically made.

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content: 오래먹이는 간식찾다가 구매해봤어요~ 새가지 맛이라 다양하게 먹일 수 있겠네요!! 껌이 너무 얇아서 소형견에게 좋을 거 같아요ㅠ 저희집 아이는 순삭하네여
reviews.content_en: I bought it looking for a long-lasting treat~ Since it comes in three flavors, I can give him variety!! The chew is really thin so it should be great for small dogs ㅠ My pup demolishes it in no time

reviews.name: 하****
reviews.content:
비슷한 우피껌을 다른 브랜드에서 계속 구매했었는데
바잇미 롤리츄가 더 저렴하고 좋네요!

맛도 다양해서 강아지가 엄청 좋아합니다 추천합니다~
reviews.content_en: I used to keep buying similar rawhide chews from other brands, but BITE ME Lollychew is cheaper and better! The variety of flavors is great too, and my dog absolutely loves it. Highly recommend~

reviews.name: 그****
reviews.content:
솔직히 오래 먹는건 잘 모르겠어요~오래 먹는다는건 그만큼 딱딱하다는건데 다른 오래먹는 제품과 비교하면 덜 딱딱해요
그래서 더 만족합니다.
스트레스 해소용으로 보상용으로 주는데 정신없이 씹어요
성격이 급해 가끔 삼키는 녀석이라 혹시 몰라 다 먹을때 까지 지켜보고 급여합니다
맛나게 잘먹어요
reviews.content_en: Honestly, I'm not sure about the long-lasting part~ Long-lasting usually means it's hard, but compared to other long-lasting products, this one is less hard. That's why I'm even more satisfied. I give it to him as a stress reliever and reward, and he chews away frantically. Since he has an impatient personality and sometimes swallows quickly, I watch him until he's done eating just to be safe. He eats it deliciously!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
처음 구매해본 우피껌 기호성 좋아요! 저희집
댕댕이는 진짜 입이 짧은데 이건 급여 할 때마다 너무 맛있어하며 먹네요! 하나 주면 꽤 오래 씹어서 세일 할 때 사니 가성비도 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: First time trying a rawhide chew and the palatability is great! My pup has a pretty picky mouth, but every time I give him this, he eats it like it's the most delicious thing! Since he chews on one for quite a while, the value for money is great when I buy on sale!

reviews.name: 여****
reviews.content:
급하게 먹는 아이인데 요거는 잘씹고 오래먹어서
재구매 했어요 :) 1주일에 한개씩 급여중이에요
기호성도 좋습니다 !
reviews.content_en: My pup tends to eat fast, but with this one he chews well and it lasts longer, so I repurchased it :) I'm giving him one per week. The palatability is great too!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
요고 하나 주니까 시간 순삭 ! 진작 사줄걸 그랬어요 
35분정도 먹는것 같구 다른맛도 다 먹으면 구매해볼려구요 🫶
reviews.content_en: Give them one of these and time flies! 🫶 Should've bought them sooner. Looks like it takes about 35 minutes to finish, and once we try all the other flavors, we'll definitely be buying more!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
제가 먹어볼 수는 없어서 무슨 맛인지 잘 모르지만,,👀
뭉치가 저렇게 집중하는 것을 보니 꿀맛인가봐요ദ്ദി˶ˊᵕˋ˵)

다른 껌들 진짜 5초 컷인데 우피껌은 오래 씹는 편!

제가 맛있는 거 먹을 때 우피껌 손에 쥐어줄 예정임니다🫶
reviews.content_en: I can't taste it myself so I'm not sure what flavor it is 👀 but seeing Munchi so focused on it, it must be delicious ദ്ദി˶ˊᵕˋ˵) Other chews are done in like 5 seconds flat, but Oophy Chew lasts way longer! I'm planning to give Oophy Chew to my pup when I'm eating something yummy 🫶

reviews.name: 성****
reviews.content: 오래 먹을 수 있는 간식찾다 구매했는데 너무 잘 먹어서 하나 더 구매하려구요 !! 가성비 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I bought this looking for a treat that lasts longer, and my pup loves it so much I'm about to buy another one!! Great value for the price 😊

reviews.name: 하****
reviews.content:
말티푸 5개월 된 아가예요! ㅠㅠ
집에 대부분 혼자 있는 시간이 많아서…
각종 장난감에 노즈워크 덴탈껌까지 해줬는데
계속 맘에 걸리더라고요…ㅠㅠ 잠이 많을 시기라지만
깼을 때 혼자있다는걸 느낄테니 ㅠㅠ
이갈이도 있어서 자꾸 깨물고 그래요! 
오래씹는 껌 급여해도 될 거 같아서 구매했는데
첨엔 킁킁 냄새만 맡더니 한번 핥고, 그러고선 열심히 물어뜯네요 ㅎㅎ 제가 나갔다 다시 바로 들어와도 신경도 안 써요 ㅋㅋ 두 박스 샀는데 기호상 맞아 다행입니당
reviews.content_en: I have a 5-month-old Maltipoo! 😭 She spends most of the day alone at home... I've given her all sorts of toys, nose work games, and dental chews, but I still worry 😭 I know puppies sleep a lot at this age, but when she wakes up alone, she'll feel it 😭 She's also teething and keeps chewing on things! I figured a long-lasting chew would be good for her, so I bought it. At first she just sniffed it, then licked it once, and now she's chomping away happily 😄 Even when I step out and come right back in, she doesn't even notice lol I bought two boxes and I'm so glad it matches her taste!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
2.4키로 2키로 두마리포메키우는 보호자에요~
소형견치고 소딱심도 5분컷이라 .. 오래먹을수있는간식을 찾고있었는데 마침우피스틱이 끌려서 😅
혹시하고 구매후 급여해보았는데 한 30분? 정도 씹더라구여~
얌전한시간에 다른걸할수있어서 너무 좋았어요 ☺️
재구매의사있습니다~
reviews.content_en: I'm a pom parent with two fur babies—one 2.4kg and one 2kg! 🐕 For a small breed, they have pretty short attention spans (like 5 min max), so I was looking for a treat that lasts longer. I saw Oophy Stick and was drawn to it 😅 I decided to try it, and they chew on it for about 30 minutes! It's so great because I can get things done while they're occupied ☺️ Definitely will repurchase!

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
두껍지 않아서 작은아이들에게도 먹일 수 있어서 좋아요~
냄새도 없고 기호성도 좋고 나름 선호하는 간식입니다~
단, 다 먹기전에 뺏아서 버려야해요!
마지막에 못 뜯오 먹고 그냥 꿀꺽 삼켜 버려요ㅠ
reviews.content_en: I like that it's not too thick, so even my smaller pup can enjoy it! No smell, good palatability, and it's become a preferred treat 🐶 But you do have to take it away before they finish it! At the end, they can't tear it apart anymore and just swallow it whole 😅

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
입맛이 아주 까다로운 2살반 포메 아가를 키우고있는 맘입니다.
별명은 후슐랭!안떨어지게 먹이니 반응이 별로라 1개월 정도 쉬었다 재주문했네요.언박싱하면서부터 흥분하더니,,혼자만의 시간을 갖더라구요ㅎㅎㅎㅎㅎ많이 웃구요 !!그걸로 만족입니다 !!
reviews.content_en: I'm a mom to a very picky 2.5-year-old Pom (nickname: Hoosheling!). When I fed it to her without letting it drop, she wasn't too interested, so I took a month break and reordered. She got excited just from unboxing it and had some alone time with it 😄😄😄 She smiled a lot! That alone made me happy!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 요거 진짜 오래먹어요!! 외출할 때 간식 안주고 나가면 난리나는 갱얼쥐쓰라서 오래먹는 껌 간식은 필수인데여ㅠㅠ 롤리츄 먹으면 시간가는줄 모르고 물고 뜯고 맛보고 즐기고~~~ 이런 오래먹는 껌간식은 대부분 조단백이 80에서 90프로 가까이 되고 매일 먹으면 혹시 건강에 무리갈까 걱정되어서 최대한 낮은 제품 찾아서 구입했는데 잘먹고 잘 놀아서 좋아요!! 크기도 4kg와 5kg 두마리 댕댕에게 모두 적합해서 먹기 좋습니다♥
reviews.content_en: This really does last forever!! 😭 My pup is such a crazy one that if I leave without giving her a treat, all hell breaks loose, so long-lasting chew treats are a must for me 😭 When she chews on Lollychew, she loses track of time chewing, tearing, tasting, and enjoying it~ Most long-lasting chew treats have crude protein around 80-90%, and I was worried about feeding them daily, so I looked for products with lower levels. She eats well and plays well with it, which is great!! The size works perfectly for both my pups (4kg and 5kg) so it's easy for them to chew ♥

reviews.name: 세****
reviews.content:
댕댕이가 너무 좋아하는 껌이예요🥺🫳🏻🫳🏻
기다리라고하니 기다리다가 냠냠하는 모습이 너무 귀엽구.. 다양한 맛이랑 무표백제를 사용했다고해서 바잇미 껌으로 먹이고 있어요
reviews.content_en: It's such a favorite chew for my pup 🥺🫳🏻🫳🏻 When I tell him to wait, he waits and then nom noms on it—so cute 🥰 Since it uses various flavors and unbleached materials, I feed him BITE ME chews!

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content:
4개월 넘어가는 강아지인데, 먹성이 좋아서 말랑한 껌 주면 호다닥 다 먹어버려용
오래 씹을 수 있다길래 구매했는데 정말 오래 물고 뜯어서 좋아요!
너무 크면 반 잘라야겠다 싶었는데 딱 적당한 크기로 되어있어서 하루에 이거 하나면 좋은거같아요!
reviews.content_en: My pup is over 4 months old with a great appetite, so she gobbles up soft chews in no time! I bought this because it's supposed to last a long time, and she really does chew and tear at it for ages, which is awesome! I was worried it might be too big and I'd have to cut it in half, but it's the perfect size, so just one a day seems ideal!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
애기가 너무 좋아해요
보호자 밥시간에 급여하는데 보채지 않고
오래 잘 가지고 놀아요
너무 짧아지면 힘든지 손으로 잡아줘야 잘근잘근 씹어요
재구매 하려고요
reviews.content_en: My baby loves it so much 🐾 I give it during my feeding time and she doesn't whine or fuss—she plays with it for a long time. When it gets too short, she has trouble chewing it, so I have to hold it for her. Planning to repurchase!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
3종류에 갯수는 다달라요
6개,7개,9개 들었어요.
굵기도 별차이없던데...
얇아서 엄청 오래먹진않지만
좋아하고 잘먹고 탈없어서
한번씩 구매중입니다.
reviews.content_en: The count varies by type—6, 7, and 9 pieces. The thickness wasn't very different... It gets soft quickly so she doesn't eat it for super long, but she loves it, eats well, and has no issues with it. I'm buying it regularly.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
2키로 포메라니안 먹이기에 좋아요.
금방 말랑해져서 한입에 넣으려고
하는걸 보고 제가 꽉 잡아주고 먹이고
있어요. 알레르기가 안 올라오길 바래요.
reviews.content_en: It's great for feeding my 2kg Pomeranian. Since it softens quickly and she tries to swallow it whole, I hold it firmly for her while she eats. Hoping it doesn't trigger any allergies.

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
정말 오래먹어요
한참동안 먹어서 놀러나갔을때 주기좋아요
막판에 삼키고나서는 좀힘들어해서 저희는 못삼키게하는게 더나을거같아요
reviews.content_en: She really takes a long time eating it. Since she chews on it for a while, it's great to give when going out. At the end when she tries to swallow it, she seems to have a hard time, so I think it's better for us not to let her swallow it.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
처음엔 낯설어서 안먹더니 지금은 진짜 너무좋아해욬ㅋㅋㅋㅋ묵고있다가 집에 가족들어오면 꼬리만흔들구 뺏을까봐 마중도안나와요… 진심 중독된듯 거의 하루에 한개 꼴로 주는거같은데
이렇게 줘도 괜찮겠죠….? ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ씹다가 쉬고있을때 쳐다보면 또 뺏을까바 급하게 물고 도망치는게 너무 웃겨여 엄청 좋아해요ㅠㅠㅠㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: At first she was hesitant and wouldn't eat it, but now she LOVES it lol 😂 When she's chewing and family comes home, she just wags her tail and won't even come greet us because she's worried we'll take it away... She's seriously addicted—I practically give her one almost every day. Is it okay to give it that often...? 😂 When she's taking a break from chewing and I look at her, she quickly grabs it and runs away because she's afraid I'll take it. It's so funny, I love it so much ㅠㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 효****
reviews.content: 오래 먹어서 좋아요 ㅋㅋㅋ 양손으로 꼭 잡고 먹는게 너무 귀여워요 ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ 하나 주면 그래도 꽤 오래 먹는 거 같아요
reviews.content_en: It's great because it lasts a long time 😂 She holds it with both paws while eating, it's so cute ㅠㅠㅠ One treat and it still seems to last quite a while!

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
개껌이 이제 바닥나서 하나 사려고 했는데 할인 중이길래 하나 구매해 봤어요
 확실히 다른 것보다는 오래 먹는 것 같긴 해요~ 다만 얘는 하루 용량이 정해져 있어서 그런지 하루에 여러 맛을 못 주는 게 좀 아쉽네요 ㅠㅠ
저희 강아지는 마누카 꿀이 원픽이었어요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ !!
reviews.content_en: We ran out of dog chews so I was going to buy one, but saw it was on sale so I picked one up. It definitely seems to last longer than other products~ But since there's a set daily amount for this one, I can't give multiple flavors in a day, which is a bit disappointing ㅠㅠ My dog's top pick was the Manuka honey one! 😂

reviews.name: 허****
reviews.content:
원래 타사제품 두꺼운거 먹이는데 너무 두꺼워서 이빨이 부러져서 좀 얇은거 없나찾다가 바잇미 롤리츄 처음 나오자마자 샀던게 기억나서 구매했어요!
마침 원쁠원이라 더 좋았아요.
이빨에 무리가지 않게 적당히 얇고 오랜시간은 아니지만 십분정도는 씹더라구요! 악력이 쎄서 우신두꺼운 것도 금방먹어요ㅠㅠ
처음 나왔을땐 1분컷이었는데 좀 두꺼워 진 것 같아서 자주 구매할 것같아요! 자주 행사해쥬세용
reviews.content_en: I used to give thicker products from other brands, but her teeth broke because they were too thick, so I was looking for something thinner. I remember buying BITE ME Lollychew right when it first came out! And it was even better with the 1+1 deal. It's the right thickness so it doesn't strain her teeth, and while not for super long, she chews for about 10 minutes! Since she has a strong bite, she finishes even thick ones quickly ㅠㅠ When it first came out it was a 1-minute chew, but it seems to have gotten a bit thicker, so I'll probably buy it often! Please run promotions regularly!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
말티는 장안좋고
포메는 마지막 급히삼켜서
이런 말린껌은 절대사지않습니다.
근데 평이좋아서 사보았어요
배송받고 지금껏 2번줬는데
배탈없이 설사도 안하고  다른간식에비해 오래먹고 좋아해요
근데 놀러온 고기파 친구강쥐는 안먹더라구요.
reviews.content_en: Maltese has digestive issues and my Pomeranian rushes to swallow at the end, so I never buy dried chews. But it had good reviews so I tried it. I've given it twice since receiving it, and there's been no stomach upset or diarrhea—she chews it longer and likes it more than other treats! But my friend's dog who visited and loves meat didn't eat it.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
▪️울강아지가 너무 좋아하는 롤리츄
▪️이갈이 시기라서 너무 잘 씹어먹어요
▪️오랫동안 먹을 수 있어서 과식방지도 되네요:)
reviews.content_en:
▪️My dog absolutely loves Lollychew
▪️Since she's teething, she's chewing and eating it really well
▪️She can eat it for a long time so it also helps prevent overeating :)
